name: High maxTransfers boundary test
description: Tests algorithm termination with high maxTransfers value (100). Uses known 13-hop path scenario. Validates the pathfinder terminates reasonably and doesn't have memory blowup with large depth limits.
notes: Based on prod-discrepancy-nonv1-user-001 scenario which has 13 hops. High maxTransfers shouldn't significantly impact performance when optimal path is found early.
